title: Low-Fat Crunchy Herbal Stir-fry
description: This sick-day Russian dish features a low-fat friendly herbal stir-fry seasoned with hot sauce and marinated vegetables for added flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: bell peppers, green
ingredients.notes: use low fat variety if available

ingredients.name: bell peppers, red
ingredients.notes: use low fat variety if available

ingredients.name: zucchini
ingredients.notes: use low fat varieties if available

ingredients.name: low-fat croutons
ingredients.notes: ensure they are low fat and gluten-free if needed

ingredients.name: honey mustard vinaigrette dressing
ingredients.notes: ensure it is low in calories and sugar

ingredients.name: low-fat hot sauce
ingredients.notes: use a mild variety to avoid overpowering the flavors

ingredients.name: mixed herbs (such as parsley, dill, mint)
ingredients.notes: ensure they are low in calories

instructions: Prepare all vegetables by washing and cutting into thin strips.
Marinate the bell peppers, zucchini, onions, and mixed herbs in the honey mustard vinaigrette for at least 30 minutes to an hour.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat and add the marinated vegetables.
Stir-fry until tender but still crisp, adding the hot sauce towards the end of cooking to avoid burning.
Toss with low-fat croutons and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional mixed herbs for added freshness.
